Jiani Chen

Graduate research assistent

Email: jiani.chen@uga.edu

Web: https://jianic.github.io/

About Me

Hi, I am current a PhD bioinformatic student at the university of Georgia, I am studying the infectious dynamic caused by respiratory virus using phylodynamics approach. I am most skilled in: Bayesian phylogenetic analysis and virus genome assembly

Projects

A novel and extenable nomenclature system of RSV

nextstrain.org/community/JianiC/rsv-genotype/

I aim to propose a novel RSV nomenclature system which provides a convenient and sustainable way to refer to the emergence of RSV strains.We also provided an RSV classification tool to perform RSV genotype assignment.

customized IRMA module for RSV genome assembly

github.com/JianiC/IRMA-RSV

A coustomized genome assembly read modules allowing the reads with different coverage across regions

RSV T-cell epiope analysis

github.com/JianiC/RSV_Epitope

I am working on computational RSV vaccine development via predicting T cell epitopes.
